programme.sub-title: Krishna grows from a naughty boy to the prince of Mathura and Dwarka, then goes on adventures to fight evil forces and protect people everywhere, always.

programme.title: Crime World
programme.desc: This show dramatizes real cases of evil conspiracies. The narrator unveils shocking secrets and hidden depths within society's underbelly. Each episode explores a different conspiracy.

programme.title: Mere Sai
programme.desc: The show traces journey of Sai Baba of Shirdi,a fakir who after witnessing injustices due to religious and caste discrimination, faces several trials and tribulations on his journey to bring peace.
programme.sub-title: The show traces journey of Sai Baba of Shirdi,a fakir who after witnessing injustices due to religious and caste discrimination, faces several trials and tribulations on his journey to bring peace.

programme.title: Vignaharta Ganesha
programme.desc: This tale explains how Lord Ganesha, son of Shankar and Parvati, and brother of Kartik, was born when Shankar took a body with an elephant head.
programme.sub-title: This tale explains how Lord Ganesha, son of Shankar and Parvati, and brother of Kartik, was born when Shankar took a body with an elephant head.

programme.title: Jai Bhairavnath
programme.desc: Three childhood friends grow apart when secrets and loyalties strain their bond, forcing them to confront what loyalty means and whether friendship can survive challenges.
programme.sub-title: Three childhood friends grow apart when secrets and loyalties strain their bond, forcing them to confront what loyalty means and whether friendship can survive challenges.

programme.title: Maa Shakti
programme.desc: Maa Shakti takes fierce forms to fight evil and restore balance. Witness her divine strength, compassion, and power as she protects life from darkness.
programme.sub-title: Maa Shakti takes fierce forms to fight evil and restore balance. Witness her divine strength, compassion, and power as she protects life from darkness.

programme.title: Shree Krishna
programme.desc: Krishna grows from a naughty boy to the prince of Mathura and Dwarka, then goes on adventures to fight evil forces and protect people everywhere, always.
programme.sub-title: Krishna grows from a naughty boy to the prince of Mathura and Dwarka, then goes on adventures to fight evil forces and protect people everywhere, always.

programme.title: Om Namah Shivay
programme.desc: A devotional series that explores the divine energy of Lord Shiva, Om Namah Shivay presents mythological stories, hymns, and spiritual journeys of devotees.
programme.sub-title: A devotional series that explores the divine energy of Lord Shiva, Om Namah Shivay presents mythological stories, hymns, and spiritual journeys of devotees.

programme.title: Karmadhikari Shanidev
programme.desc: Narada, angered by Shanidev's elevated status, challenges Narayan. Narayan defends Shanidev, rationalizing his past and current position with sound reasoning and divine understanding.
programme.sub-title: Narada, angered by Shanidev's elevated status, challenges Narayan. Narayan defends Shanidev, rationalizing his past and current position with sound reasoning and divine understanding.

programme.title: Maharana Pratap
programme.desc: Young prince Pratap, a fearless patriot and warrior, loves his land dearly. Guided by his mother Jaivantabai and Guru Raghavendra, he upholds noble ideals and the spirit of courage.
programme.sub-title: Young prince Pratap, a fearless patriot and warrior, loves his land dearly. Guided by his mother Jaivantabai and Guru Raghavendra, he upholds noble ideals and the spirit of courage.

programme.title: Vikram Aur Betal
programme.desc: Based on India mythological collection of 25 stories known as Baital Pachisi. It revolves around the Kind Vikram who is tasked to capture a Betaal, a celestial spirit analogus to Vampire.
programme.sub-title: Based on India mythological collection of 25 stories known as Baital Pachisi. It revolves around the Kind Vikram who is tasked to capture a Betaal, a celestial spirit analogus to Vampire.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin's very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China's perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region's top stories as they happen. programme.title: Sports Life - Ice In Her Veins: Cancer Survivor Takes On Arctic Endurance Event
programme.desc: Crossing 160km of Arctic snow on skis in one of the world's toughest endurance events would be the challenge of a lifetime for most people. But for Paneeraq Kreutzmann, it's simply part of her recovery from chemotherapy. The Greenlandic native is taking on the Arctic Circle Race, aiming to represent people who, like herself, have suffered from breast cancer.
